nodes.name: Watch raw_audio Folder
nodes.notes: Watches for new .m4a or .mp3 files dropped into raw_audio/. Triggers pipeline automatically when a new recording arrives.

nodes.name: Parse Filename
nodes.notes: Parses the filename to extract account_id and call_type. Sets up routing for Pipeline A or B.

nodes.name: Route: Demo or Onboarding?
nodes.notes: Routes to Pipeline A (demo → v1) or Pipeline B (onboarding → v2)

nodes.name: Transcribe Audio (Groq Whisper)
nodes.notes: Pipeline A Step 1: Runs transcribe.py on the demo audio file. Pyannote detects speakers, Groq Whisper converts speech to text. Output saved to inputs/<account_id>_demo.txt

nodes.name: Extract Account Memo (Groq LLM)
nodes.notes: Pipeline A Step 2: Groq LLM reads the transcript and extracts structured business info. Output: outputs/accounts/<account_id>/v1/account_memo.json

nodes.name: Generate Agent Spec v1 (Groq LLM)
nodes.notes: Pipeline A Step 3: Groq LLM generates Clara's full phone script from the account memo. Output: outputs/accounts/<account_id>/v1/agent_spec.json

nodes.name: Save v1 Outputs to Storage
nodes.notes: Logs completion of Pipeline A. In production, this node would push to Supabase, Airtable, or Google Sheets.

nodes.name: Create Task in Tracker
nodes.notes: Creates a task in Asana/Trello/Notion to review the v1 agent spec. Mocked here — replace with actual API node when production access available.

nodes.name: Transcribe Onboarding Audio
nodes.notes: Pipeline B Step 1: Transcribes the onboarding call audio. Output saved to inputs/<account_id>_onboarding.txt

nodes.name: Check v1 Memo Exists
nodes.notes: Safety check: ensures v1 memo exists before attempting to generate v2. Prevents orphaned v2 outputs.

nodes.name: Update Memo to v2 (Groq LLM)
nodes.notes: Pipeline B Step 2: Diffs v1 memo against onboarding transcript. Applies patch to produce v2 memo + changelog. Output: outputs/accounts/<account_id>/v2/account_memo.json + changelog/<account_id>_changes.json

nodes.name: Generate Agent Spec v2 (Groq LLM)
nodes.notes: Pipeline B Step 3: Regenerates Clara's phone script from the updated v2 memo. Output: outputs/accounts/<account_id>/v2/agent_spec.json

nodes.name: Save v2 Outputs + Changelog
nodes.notes: Logs completion of Pipeline B. In production, this would update the account record in Supabase/Airtable with v2 status.

nodes.name: Notify: Agent Ready for Retell
nodes.notes: Notifies team that v2 agent spec is ready to import into Retell. Mocked on free tier — with production Retell API access, this node would auto-create/update the agent via POST /agents.

nodes.name: Error Handler
nodes.notes: Catches any pipeline failures and logs them cleanly. In production, this would send a Slack/email alert.

meta.description: Clara Answers full automation pipeline. Pipeline A: demo call → v1 agent spec. Pipeline B: onboarding call → v2 agent spec + changelog. Zero cost using Groq free tier + local file storage.
meta.author: Clara Answers Intern Assignment
